positive: A whimsical, symmetrical cosmic forest scene composition. Silhouettes of stylized, bioluminescent flora and fauna (e.g., glowing mushrooms, crystalline ferns, crescent moons) populate the deep night sky and foreground. The style is high-contrast, graphic illustrative vector art with a magical, dreamlike aesthetic. Utilize a limited, deep color palette: midnight indigo, electric cyan, and muted gold. The composition should be centered and circular, making it ideal for chest placement on apparel. Focus on clean lines, perfect edges, and strong negative space contrast. Studio lighting setup, maximal detail, perfect symmetry, highly detailed line work.
